title: How to Tune a Guitar
absolute: How to Tune a Guitar - Step-by-Step Online Tuner Guide
description: Step-by-step guide to tuning a guitar with EasyTuner: EADGBE reference tones, microphone strobe dial, cents readout, auto-advance, and tips for beginners.

title: Guitar String Frequencies
absolute: Guitar String Frequencies (Hz) — Standard EADGBE Chart
description: Reference chart of standard guitar string frequencies in Hz (E2–E4), how A4 = 440 Hz works, cents vs Hertz, and what EasyTuner's strobe dial is measuring.

title: Standard Guitar Tuning
absolute: Standard Guitar Tuning (EADGBE) — Notes, Intervals & Uses
description: What standard EADGBE guitar tuning means: string notes E2–E4, perfect fourths and the G–B major third, why it became the default, and which styles assume it.

title: Drop D vs Standard Tuning
absolute: Drop D vs Standard Tuning — Which Should You Use?
description: Compare Drop D (DADGBE) and standard EADGBE guitar tuning: sound, genres, power chords, switching tips, and when to use EasyTuner's Drop D tuner.
